历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 22512, which significantly moved forward to 13386 in 2023, and then moved back to 19193 in 2024; in 2025, Sichuan's first year of the new college entrance examination, the lowest rank for physics category was approximately 34455, a significant backward shift compared to previous science ranks, mainly due to batch merging and changes in subject selection mode; 2025 is the new baseline year; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for science/physics category: 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 31 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 32, a slight expansion of about 3.2% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to shift the rank backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 55-67 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier medical schools with a high level of education; no obvious negative events were found in the reputation and public opinion documents, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 78 and a rating of 'average', indicating low attention on short video platforms and overall stable application heat without abnormal fluctuation signals; as one of the four independently established 211 medical universities, clinical medicine, stomatology, and basic medicine are its core advantageous disciplines, with high recognition in the medical field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as clinical medicine, stomatology, and nursing continue to be hot/recommended in society; the total number of Sichuan Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to the total of about 462,767 for physics and history categories in 2025, with a significant expansion of the candidate pool, intensifying competition and putting pressure on rank advancement; Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin City, recruiting from outside the province in Sichuan, with no local preference; the university has a relatively high proportion of local enrollment in Tianjin, with limited out-of-province spots, and cross-province application competition has intensified due to the expansion of the candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 new college entrance examination baseline rank of 34455, a slight expansion of about 3.2% in 2026 (rank backward shift of about 667), a significant increase of about 15.6% in the total number of Sichuan candidates (intensified competition, rank forward shift), stable reputation, and high popularity of medical majors, the effects of expansion and candidate increase offset each other, with the intensified competition from the expanded candidate pool being more significant. It is predicted that the lowest rank for physics category in 2026 will be approximately 34622, with a range of 34122-35122.
